objects.query: SELECT Id, Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryAuthority WHERE Name IN ('Food Premises Regulation', 'Public Health Act', 'Canadian Food Inspection Agency', 'BCCDC') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSRegulatoryAuthority'

SELECT Id, Name, Subject, Description, EffectiveFrom, RegulatoryAuthorityId, RegulatoryAuthority.Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryCode WHERE RegulatoryAuthority.Name IN ('Food Premises Regulation', 'Public Health Act', 'Canadian Food Inspection Agency', 'BCCDC') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSRegulatoryCode'

SELECT Id, Name, Category__c, DataType, Criticality__c, InspectionQuestiontype__c, PHOCSParentId__c, PHOCSParentId__r.Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentIndicatorDefinition WHERE Category__c IN ('Construction of Food Premises', 'Approvals and Permits', 'Food Sources and Protection', 'Equipment, Utensils and Cleaning', 'Employee', 'Food Safety Management', 'Miscellaneous', 'Training', 'Previously Served Food', 'Temporary Food Service and Inspection Report', 'Permit to Operate Food Service Establishment') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSAssessmentIndicatorDefinition' ORDER BY PHOCSParentId__c NULLS FIRST

SELECT Id, AssessmentIndDefinitionId, AssessmentIndDefinition.Name, AssessmentIndDefinition.Category__c, AssessmentIndDefinition.PHOCSParentId__r.Name, RegulatoryCodeId, RegulatoryCode.Name, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryCodeAssessmentInd WHERE AssessmentIndDefinition.Category__c IN ('Construction of Food Premises', 'Approvals and Permits', 'Food Sources and Protection', 'Equipment, Utensils and Cleaning', 'Employee', 'Food Safety Management', 'Miscellaneous', 'Training', 'Previously Served Food', 'Temporary Food Service and Inspection Report', 'Permit to Operate Food Service Establishment')

SELECT Id, Name, TaskType, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentTaskDefinition WHERE Name IN ('Construction of Food Premises', 'Approvals and Permits', 'Food Sources and Protection', 'Equipment, Utensils and Cleaning', 'Employee', 'Food Safety Management', 'Miscellaneous', 'Permit to Operate Food Service Establishment', 'Training', 'Previously Served Food', 'Temporary Food Service and Inspection Report') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSAssessmentTaskDefinition'

SELECT Id, AssessmentTaskDefinitionId, AssessmentTaskDefinition.Name, AssessmentIndDefinitionId, AssessmentIndDefinition.Name, AssessmentIndDefinition.Category__c, AssessmentIndDefinition.PHOCSParentId__r.Name, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentTaskIndDefinition WHERE AssessmentTaskDefinition.Name IN ('Construction of Food Premises', 'Approvals and Permits', 'Food Sources and Protection', 'Equipment, Utensils and Cleaning', 'Employee', 'Food Safety Management', 'Miscellaneous', 'Permit to Operate Food Service Establishment', 'Training', 'Previously Served Food', 'Temporary Food Service and Inspection Report')
